title: Just Enough Swords [JES]
description: A Mod That Adds Multiple Cool Swords To The Game!
body:
# Swords Mod:

## Stay updated through my [[Trello](https://trello.com/b/Vqt2SWVB/jes)]

![[JES]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25080a600945e8926c34ba45e267ba11d664a723_0.webp)

Find The Recipes At **[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/jes/gallery)** Or Use creative mode to try The Swords

This mod adds some new swords that you can use when playing minecraft!
most swords are helpful and other swords are just for fun!
Since i just started making this mod there shouldn't be any more swords right now, more soon!


<details>
<summary>Version info</summary>

## Supported Modloaders:
-   Neoforge [**Main**]
-   Forge
-   Fabric

[NOTE: Fabric And Forge Modloaders Are **EXPERIMENTAL**, Mod features can break]

## Supported Versions:
- Neoforge [**1.20.6** - **1.21.1** - **1.21.4** - **1.21.8** (**Main**)]
- Forge [**1.20.1**]
- Fabric [**1.21.8**]

## Recommended Versions:
- Neoforge [**1.21.8**] Full Experience
- Fabric [**1.21.8**]

## Known Issues:
- Dublicator UI Won't Open [**Fabric** (**1.21.8**)]  

```
latest mod version [1.3.0]
```
</details>
